title: Declaration from the International Conference of the International Alliance on Preventing Sexual Violence in Conflict, November 2024
body: "The joint declaration follows discussion at the second high-level meeting of the International Alliance on Preventing Sexual Violence in Conflict, which took place in Bogotá, Colombia, in November 2024.  Lord Collins of Highbury, the Prime Minister’s Special Representative on Preventing Sexual Violence in Conflict represented the UK and has endorsed the declaration.  These members of the International Alliance on Preventing Sexual Violence in Conflict (PSVI) have endorsed this statement:  State members:   Australia Colombia Democratic Republic of the Congo France Japan Luxembourg Republic of Korea Spain Switzerland Ukraine United Kingdom United States of America   Non-state members:   Global Survivors Fund Justice Rapid Response Legal Action Worldwide Mukwege Foundation PSVI Survivor Advisory Group Sisma Mujer UN Women  "
